summary: Backend API Regression Test Complete - All 27 tests passed (100%). Verified all API endpoints still work after frontend migration to centralized apiConfig.ts. No backend issues detected.
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed data created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression after frontend apiConfig.ts migration completed. All endpoints verified: health, scripts CRUD, scripts/upload validation, acting-coach analyze + scenes, dialect accents + sample-lines, daily-drill + feedback + complete, streak, users, subscription/plans, voices/presets, tapes/share + HTML share page, voice-studio validation errors. XSS protection and error sanitization continue to work correctly.

Error handling: 500 errors return sanitized messages
Error handling: invalid input returns 422 with Pydantic validation
GET /api/tape/{actor}/{id} returns HTML share page with XSS protection
